validated_findings.name: public-symbol-search
validated_findings.note: Public symbols expose nt!CmQueryValueKey, nt!CmQueryValueKeyCallout, nt!NtQueryValueKey, and nt!ZwQueryValueKey.

validated_findings.name: cmquery-first-hit-shape
validated_findings.note: CmQueryValueKey is reachable and the queried value name is provided through the UNICODE_STRING pointer in @rdx.

heavy_watch_attempts.note: Raw value-name logging produced a large log and no target-name hits, but shell health did not recover before timeout.
The bs/.if/@@c++ filtered command still fails to parse cleanly, so no real REGPROBE_KEY_HIT blocks were emitted.

recovery.note: The secondary VM was restored to a shell-healthy debug baseline after the heavy watch attempts.

next_actions: replace the failing conditional command with a parser-safe WinDbg filter form for nt!CmQueryValueKey
keep filtering lightweight enough that shell health returns without timeout
only use WinDbg as the final dead-flag arbiter after the filtered watch becomes terminal
